hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.go) goimports -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || gofmt -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; *.ts|*.tsx) npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; exit 0'
bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qi "co-authored-by"; then echo "禁止添加 Co-Authored-By 标签" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.env|*.env.*) echo "禁止修改 .env 文件" >&2; exit 2 ;; */go.sum) echo "禁止直接修改 go.sum" >&2; exit 2 ;; */package-lock.json|*/pnpm-lock.yaml|*/yarn.lock|*/uv.lock) echo "禁止直接修改 lock 文件" >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; exit 0'
bash -c 'MSG=$(echo "$CLAUDE_NOTIFICATION" | head -c 200); osascript -e "display notification \"$MSG\" with title \"Claude Code\"" 2>/dev/null; exit 0'
